item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Creamy Jerusalem artichoke soup on a base of root vegetables, finished withgreen truffle oil and fresh herbs. Served with grilled sourdough toast withwild garlic butter. Crisp seed and bean salad on the side (1+6)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Makali, crispy fried cauliflower served with fresh quinoa tabbouleh, creamyhummus and pita from the local bakery, topped with parsley. Pickled kohlrabiand lemon on the side (1+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Salt baked celeriac served with black lentils and finished with sauce café deParis with browned butter, garlic, capers, shallots and parsley. Crisp friséesalad with vinaigrette on the side (6+11+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Chili sin carne with protein rich legumes and vegetables, full of depth with agentle smoky heat from chipotle (10+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Creamy penne with mushrooms, puy lentils and spinach, rich and comforting,topped with parmesan and fresh herbs. Roasted vegetables with pesto on the side (1+6+15)
